case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS RIVERS, SHARI R.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, SHARI R.
